title: WHISPER user_exists check runs before subscription gate
description: ws.rs:1152 calls user_exists() before the require_subscription check at ws.rs:1176. An unsubscribed user distinguishes 'recipient not found' from 'subscription required', leaking enrollment status. SEALED_WHISPER has the same ordering flaw (nie-gsyn.2 covers SEALED_WHISPER). Move the subscription check before user_exists in both WHISPER and SEALED_WHISPER.
